expectedInteractions.selectVersion: click version -> onSelectVersion -> default storage key saved -> popup closed
expectedInteractions.closeEsc: press Esc -> Bits UI closes top dialog -> onClose -> popup closed
expectedInteractions.outsideClick: click outside -> Bits UI closes dialog -> onClose -> popup closed
expectedInteractions.keyboard: ArrowUp/ArrowDown/Home/End changes active option; Enter/Space selects active option
